channel.title: Home & Garden on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Home & Garden on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO Botanicals Wildflower Bouquet Set - Artificial Flowers - Gifts for Mother s Day with Poppies and Lavender - Home Office Decor Set for Adults - Botanical Collection - 10313
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Botanicals Wildflower Bouquet Set - Artificial Flowers - Gifts for Mother s Day with Poppies and Lavender - Home Office Decor Set for Adults - Botanical Collection - 10313 here: ℹ️: Features 16 stems with a mix of flowers: cornflower, lavender, Welsh poppies, cow parsley, leatherleaf ferns, gerbera daisies, larkspur and lupins Let your creativity blossom with the vibrant LEGO Botanicals Wildflower Bouquet set, which features 8 different stunning species of flowers to build Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, this set includes elements made of plant-based plastic, produced from sustainably sourced sugar cane The wonderful artificial flowers will never wilt or need to be watered!

item.title: LEGO Botanicals Bouquet of Roses - Artificial Flowers Set for Adults - Gifts for Mother s Day incl. 12 Faux Roses in 3 Stages of Bloom - Home or Office Décor Accessories - Relaxing Activities - 10328
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Botanicals Bouquet of Roses - Artificial Flowers Set for Adults - Gifts for Mother s Day incl. 12 Faux Roses in 3 Stages of Bloom - Home or Office Décor Accessories - Relaxing Activities - 10328 here: ℹ️: Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection – Discover a space for relaxation with the wide range of LEGO construction sets designed for adults What’s in the box? – All you need to craft 12 artificial rose flowers with long green stems and 4 baby’s breath springs with small white LEGO flowers Build solo or with friends and family – This LEGO artificial flowers set includes 6 brick bags and separate instructions for 3 flowering stages Blooming buds – The LEGO Botanicals flower bouquet building set for adults depicts 4 artificial red roses in full bloom, 4 blossoming and 4 in bud Buildable LEGO flowers for home décor – Indulge yourself or join friends for a mindful project building the LEGO Botanicals roses set for adults Roses bouquet – Are you looking for unique home accessories?
